data.content: Plan recorded against the current duplicate `_collect_discovered_models()` implementations in `scripts/setup.sh` and `scripts/agent-wizard.sh`. The recommended implementation is a thresholded interactive picker for large OpenCode model lists only, preserving the current small-list numbered menu and manual-entry path. Two child knots were created: `foolery-ec3a` for the picker implementation and `foolery-cd7e` for shell plus PTY regression coverage. Primary execution risks are raw-terminal cleanup and escape-sequence handling; PTY tests should verify filtering, backspace reset, arrow navigation, multi-select, and small-list no-regression behavior.
